positive: A vibrant, mystical woodland scene featuring a stylized fox curled up in a bed of bioluminescent mushrooms. The fox has deep, rich orange and white fur, set against an elegant backdrop of interwoven roots and glowing ferns. Emphasize high contrast and deep jewel tones (sapphire blues, emerald greens, ruby reds) mixed with the soft glow of magical light. The composition should be centralized and symmetrical, designed as a repeating, scalable pattern motif. Minimalist black outline elements are encouraged to give it a clean silhouette effect. Art style: Modern folk art illustration meets geometric engraving, suitable for screen printing. Highly detailed, concept art quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor quality, noise, jpeg artifacts, gradient
